# Travel Times Milwaukee

> Free, ad-free iOS app showing real-time travel times for Milwaukee-area freeways, powered by official Wisconsin DOT (WisDOT) sensor data. Runs on iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Vision, and Apple Watch, with Lock Screen Live Activities and Dynamic Island support.

Key facts:

- Price: $0 — free forever, no ads, no in-app purchases
- Privacy: no analytics, no tracking, no accounts, no third-party services
- Requirements: iOS 17.4 or later; app size about 1.2 MB
- Coverage: I-94, I-43, I-894, US-45, I-41, I-794, and I-39/90 in the greater Milwaukee area
- Features: color-coded route status (clear / slowing / congested), pinned favorites with iCloud sync, delay and scheduled alerts, active incident details, one-tap sharing, full Apple Watch app with complications
- Data source: Wisconsin Department of Transportation real-time sensor feed (no crowdsourcing)
- Developer: Vinny Carpenter (https://vinny.dev), independent, Milwaukee-based
- App Store rating: 4.8 stars

## Pages

- [Home](https://traveltimesapp.com/): features, live board demo, screenshots, reviews, and download links
- [User guide](https://traveltimesapp.com/guide.html): how to use the app on iPhone, iPad, and Apple Watch — favorites, notifications, Live Activities, route groups, and Siri commute answers
- [Privacy policy](https://traveltimesapp.com/privacy.html)
- [Terms of use](https://traveltimesapp.com/terms.html)

## Download

- [Travel Times Milwaukee on the App Store](https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/apple-store/id932688030?pt=543741&ct=website&mt=8)
